task_completion.description: Verify that the saved reply is being created for or is associated with the 'IT Support' mailbox.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a dropdown, label, or table column indicating the mailbox is set to 'IT Support' on the saved reply creation or list page.

task_completion.description: Verify that the name of the saved reply is exactly 'Password Reset Instructions'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the text 'Password Reset Instructions' in the 'Name' or 'Title' input field, or listed as the title in the saved replies list.

task_completion.description: Verify that the body of the saved reply contains the required instructional phrases.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the rich text editor or reply preview. It must contain the phrases: 'password.company.com', 'Forgot Password', 'employee ID', 'verification code', 'minimum 12 characters', and 'extension 4357'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the saved reply was successfully created and saved.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a success message (e.g., 'Saved reply created', 'Saved successfully') or the presence of the new reply in the main list of saved replies.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent used the web browser GUI to interact with FreeScout.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for a standard web browser interface (tabs, address bar) displaying the FreeScout application, rather than terminal windows executing curl or database commands.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent interacted with the actual FreeScout application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for authentic FreeScout UI elements such as the navigation sidebar, user profile icon, and standard layout, ensuring it is not a generic text editor.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the visual output.
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure the browser developer tools (Inspect Element console, DOM editor) are not open or visible in the screenshots.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected Name: 'Password Reset Instructions'. Expected Mailbox: 'IT Support'. Required phrases in the body content: 'password.company.com', 'Forgot Password', 'employee ID', 'verification code', 'minimum 12 characters', and 'extension 4357'.
